name: TCIL_ResetResponseContent
title: TCIL_ResetResponseContent
syntax: long TCIL_ResetResponseContent(dbNode client, dword command, dword subcommand); // form 1
description: The function resets the modification of TCIL_SetResponseContent. The TC IL returns to the default response behaviour.

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: TC simulation node to apply the function.
